name: Launcher Makefile Shim
summary: Add a thin Makefile shim over an existing `./go`-style launcher so `make`, `make go`, `make dev`, `make restart`, `make ports`, `make doctor`, `make build`,…
description: Add a thin Makefile shim over an existing `./go`-style launcher so `make`, `make go`, `make dev`, `make restart`, `make ports`, `make doctor`, `make build`, `make clean`, and `make help` all work — without touching the underlying launcher's logic. Includes `.claude/launch.json` for Claude Code Preview integration and a README troubleshooting block.
author: marvelousempire
